name: Example ICP — vertical SaaS buyers
description: Edit these to match your ICP. Weights are relative; the scorer normalizes them. Each criterion is judged true/false by the classify skill, grounded on your corpus.

criteria.description: Operates in a target vertical (e.g. industrial automation, vertical SaaS, logistics).
Headcount roughly 100-2000 — past the early-stage chaos, not yet locked into an incumbent suite.
Shows active investment in AI/automation (hiring, product launches, public statements).
